hero.name: Lee Ho Sing Cyrus
hero.title: Full Stack Web Developer
hero.tagline: Full-stack developer who excels where frontend and backend must work as one — integration, business logic, and delivery under pressure.

about.text: Full-stack web developer with 5+ years of experience building production systems in Laravel, Vue, and JavaScript. My strongest value is FE/BE integration and delivery under pressure: I led KNSM for 20+ schools, handled DrugInSport's 10k+ drug-data imports, and revamped HKAB's 16-server operations, cutting key procedures from 20+ minutes to 5–10 minutes. I also lead AI agent adoption at FirmStudio, using AI to remove friction while keeping clear requirements and human communication at the centre of delivery.
highlights: Full-stack integration — KNSM lead (20+ schools); strongest where FE/BE are tightly coupled
Backend & crisis delivery — HKAB ops turnaround (20+ min to 5–10 min); DrugInSport 10k+ import
AI with judgment — lead AI agent rollout; clear requirements and communication over blind automation

experience.summary: Full-stack developer building multi-tenant internal systems, client web applications, and production operation tooling.
bullets: KNSM (2024 — maintenance): full-stack development of an internal Po Leung Kuk kindergarten platform used by 20+ schools; Vue 3 frontend and Laravel backend.
DrugInSport (2025): built all JavaScript (jQuery) and backend (Laravel 11) for ADOHK's public anti-doping drug lookup; 10,000+ drug records with chunked Excel import and memory optimization.
HKAB (2022–2023; maintenance; ops script revamp in 2025): built member area permissions and revamped 16-server on-premise operation scripts, cutting key procedures from 20+ minutes to 5–10 minutes.
Led AI agent adoption (2026): evaluated agent solutions, gathered team feedback, and rolled out Cursor Skills for code scanning, document generation, and plan-mode workflows.

experience.summary: Full-stack web development across loyalty, e-commerce, booking, and POS-integrated online shop modules.
bullets: Built DentalMiles, a dental loyalty and booking platform covering points redemption, online booking, Miles Rewards, and eShop features.
Developed HIPPOS online shop module for multiple retailers, integrating POS APIs, inventory sync, automatic discounts, promo codes, and online payments.

projects.title: KNSM — Po Leung Kuk Kindergarten Management System
projects.description: 2024 — Present (maintenance). Full-stack internal platform for Po Leung Kuk kindergartens and nurseries, serving 20+ campuses with student management, fee billing, reports, and Oracle AR/RA exports.

projects.title: DrugInSport — Anti-Doping Drug Database
projects.description: 2025. Public anti-doping drug lookup for ADOHK. UI by design team; I built all JavaScript and backend logic, including a 10,000+ drug-record import pipeline with chunked processing, memory tuning, approval flow, and scheduled launch.

projects.title: HKAB — Member Area & On-Premise Operations
projects.description: 2022–2023 development; maintenance ongoing; operation script revamp in 2025. Member portal with granular permissions plus 16-server on-premise operations, covering CMS file sync, DB replication, backup, failover, restart procedures, and operation guide documentation.

projects.title: HIPPOS — Online Shop Module
projects.description: Online shop module for HIPPOS, an iPad retail management platform. Built multi-tenant storefronts with POS API integration, inventory and membership sync, discount rules, promo codes, and payment processing.

projects.title: DentalMiles — Loyalty & Booking Platform
projects.description: Dental loyalty and booking platform combining points redemption, DentalMiles to CDE conversion, online booking with quota rules, Miles Rewards, and eShop features in one web system.

education.institution: The Hong Kong Institute of Vocational Education (Tsing Yi)
